query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN result='hit' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hits, SUM(CASE WHEN result='miss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as misses FROM daily_results WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-20' AND source = 'money';
